summary: Iteration 66 - UI Repair testing: BottomNav 4-item layout, role-specific Create button, Profile redirects, Stoked 'Buying Power' language, ImpactDashboard Hobbyist payout hidden, God Mode getEffectiveRole fix. All core features VERIFIED.

bottomnav_4_item_layout.details: Bottom nav shows exactly 4 items: Home | Search | Create (center) | Profile. Layout verified on mobile viewport.

create_button_photographer_start.details: Photographers see 'Start' button with cyan gradient (from-cyan-400 to-blue-500) and Radio icon. data-testid='bottomnav-create-start' works correctly.

create_button_surfer_request.details: Surfers see 'Request' button with yellow gradient (from-yellow-400 to-orange-400) and Camera icon. data-testid='bottomnav-create-request' works correctly.

profile_redirect_photographer_impacted.details: Photographer roles (Hobbyist, Grom Parent, Photographer, Approved Pro) show 'Impact' label and redirect to /impacted.

profile_redirect_comp_surfer_peak.details: Comp Surfer and Pro roles show 'Peak' label and redirect to /career/the-peak.

profile_redirect_grom_inside.details: Grom role shows 'Inside' label and redirects to /career/the-inside.

stoked_buying_power_language.details: Stoked dashboard shows 'Buying Power' with 'SURF CREDITS' badge. Text: 'Powered by photographers & brands who believe in you' and 'Your community fuels your surf career'. No negative/extractive language.

impact_dashboard_hobbyist_payout_hidden.details: Hobbyist role sees 'Gear Credits' instead of 'Withdrawable'. No 'withdraw' or 'payout' references shown. Shows 'Community Impact' focus.

god_mode_getEffectiveRole_fix.details: All getEffectiveRole() calls now correctly pass user?.role parameter: getEffectiveRole(user?.role). This fixes the 'Regular Surfer transaction error' in God Mode.

god_mode_persona_switcher.details: God Mode Persona Switcher dropdown shows all personas (Surfer, Grom, Comp Surfer, Photographer, Hobbyist, etc.). Cyan banner shows 'Currently viewing as: [ROLE]' when active.

getEffectiveRole_fix_verified.details: All 3 files now correctly pass user?.role to getEffectiveRole() instead of calling without parameter.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI repairs verified: BottomNav has 4-item layout with role-specific Create button (Start for photographers, Request for surfers). Profile redirects work correctly based on role. Stoked dashboard uses 'Buying Power' language. ImpactDashboard hides payout for Hobbyist. getEffectiveRole() fix verified in code - now correctly passes user?.role parameter. Map page loading was slow during testing but core features confirmed working.
